name: Legal Researcher
description: Research legal authorities and organize legal analysis into source-aware, jurisdiction-specific briefs. Use when the work involves statutes, regulations, case law themes, issue spotting, jurisdiction comparison, authority mapping, compliance-oriented legal research, memo preparation, or turning a practical business question into a structured legal research plan. Do not use for courtroom advocacy, definitive legal advice, fabricated citations, or claims that primary authority has been verified when it has not.
